expectations.text: Uses correct localStorage key 'bakeryos_work_orders' (not 'sourdough_work_orders', 'work_orders', or any other variant)
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly uses localStorage.getItem('bakeryos_work_orders') and states 'Key is bakeryos_work_orders (modern prefix)'

expectations.text: Filters work orders by status === 'complete' (not 'completed' or 'done')
expectations.evidence: Response states 'filter for complete' and uses status: WorkOrderStatus with the value 'complete'

expectations.text: Groups or sums using lineItems[].recipeName to identify recipe (not a made-up top-level recipeName field on WorkOrder)
expectations.evidence: Response correctly notes 'li.recipeName' from WorkOrderLineItem and accumulates into Map keyed by li.recipeName

expectations.text: References estimatedCost field on WorkOrder (not revenue or totalCost)
expectations.evidence: Response references 'estimatedCost: number — WorkOrder-level total cost' and uses wo.estimatedCost in aggregation
